roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: SENTENCING/X: PLEA IS TAKEN IN ABSENTIA: MILLS WAIVER RECEIVED & ACCEPTED/TWS/CH2:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:2 /SWAPD: 7-14-21/PF460 18/VF2:150/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID: 1 YEARS/CTORD: MUST COMPLETE 18 MONTHS DUI CLASSES/COMUN:50/ADPRS1: 4-16-19 IN SANTA CLARA COUNTY/X: RESTITUTION IS RESERVED/X: MUST NOT REFUSE AND ALCOHOL TESTING/MADD/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE ASTHOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL:DISPOSITION/DAWT/JAVS/X:THE COURT DOES NOT ACCEPT THE DEFENDANT'S MILLS WAIVER AS CURRENTLY WRITTEN/X:COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENSE IS ASKED TO MAKECERTAIN CHANGES TO THE MILL'S WAIVER DOCUMENT, AS FURTHER SET FORTH ON THERECORD/CONTD:CHSNGE OF PLEA AND DISPOSITION/DAWF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE, SET OR DISPO, JURY TRIAL/SB:2 HOUR/
/CAL: DISPOSITION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/
